title: perilla ocymoides
intro: Perilla ocymoides, also known as Japanese basil or Chinese basil, is a perennial plant native to East Asia, characterized by its small white or purple flowers and distinctive minty fragrance. Traditionally, the leaves and seeds of Perilla ocymoides have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, alleviating asthma symptoms, and protecting against certain cancers. Perilla ocymoides can be consumed in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and supplements, which are often used to support cardiovascular health and immune function.
